rawUrlDescription: Paste a full URL or edit the structured builder fields. Both views stay in sync.
invalidUrlEmptyDescription: Enter a complete URL to start parsing.
invalidUrlRelativeDescription: Use an absolute URL with a protocol, such as https://example.com/path.
invalidUrlMalformedDescription: The URL could not be parsed. Check the hostname, port, and reserved characters.
invalidProtocolError: Use a valid protocol such as https, http, ftp, ws, or a custom scheme.
invalidPortError: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535.
emptyQueryState: Add query pairs to build a search string.
